Cara Test di Step Functions Console
Step 1: Go to Step Functions → Start Execution
Paste test input ini:

{
  "reporting_year": 2024,
  "bank_id": "GENERIC_FI_001",
  "framework": "GRI_305",
  "output_bucket": "esg-output-reports-061039769766",
  "kb_id": "WVREXI1LEI",
  "section_templates": [
    {
      "template_id": "GRI_305_SCOPE1_2024",
      "framework": "GRI_305",
      "section_type": "scope1"
    }
  ]
}

Key: section_templates array cuma punya 1 item (Scope 1). Ini bikin Map state iterate cuma 1x.

Step 2: Monitor di Console
Lo akan liat flow:

ValidateInput ✅ (harus PASS)
  → CheckValidation ✅
    → WaitForGlueJobs (Parallel — 3 Glue jobs)
      → TriggerAggregation
        → QueryAthena
          → GenerateSections (Map — 1 iteration only)
            → InvokeSectionGen → InvokeValidation → ValidationChoice
              → AccumulateSection (if PASS/WARN)
          → FilterSections
            → AssembleDocument
              → NotifyCompletion
                → Success ✅
Step 3: Verify di CloudWatch

  "reporting_year": 2024,
  "bank_id": "GENERIC_FI_001",
  "framework": "GRI_305",
  "output_bucket": "esg-output-reports-061039769766",

}

How to response human review:

### accept

aws stepfunctions send-task-success \
--task-token "" \ 
--task-output "{\"review_decision\": \"APPROVED\"}" --region us-east-1

### harus satu line jadi kaya dibawah ini:
aws stepfunctions send-task-success --task-token "
HB2wCjQpqs8X2ixgo13UPnsmD81IV17ReGfkCmXDEHct854ctIg8X
GFZwv74gSgfQvCLpZ8Kx2sVrrG39Wrzbv2QhU3ZPKqytJbeBmA757BKXiepaN5cVmd73+3yirWWx4MWgQfXZa3UjtQMZYifdk3kD3uAXiAXCfbxRbzgFyXsOM7byG686Tz17qTmMkqQw9AhhmjFR0OfC9yfjggioO2hUNZyVBoMh5beHUmGlAMJWw4PfUa1OCsMbzpBVCkJr7PwRzZADJ4rwgA" --task-output "{\"review_decision\": \"APPROVED\"}" --region us-east-1


### accept but exclude section

aws stepfunctions send-task-failure \
  --task-token "" \
  --error "REJECTED" \
  --cause "Section contains calculated value not in source data" \
  --region us-east-1
